blocks.title: Scaling Recommendation Systems
blocks.description: Optimize the e-commerce funnel and deploy a robust recommendation engine for a high-traffic flash sale.

blocks.title: The Scenario
blocks.body: You are the newly hired Data Strategy Team for a rapidly growing multi-category cosmetics platform. It is three weeks before the biggest flash sale of the year. The CMO and CFO are relying on your team to optimize the e-commerce funnel, protect the marketing budget, and deploy a robust recommendation engine that will not crash the AWS servers when traffic spikes.

blocks.title: The Baseline & The E-commerce Funnel
blocks.description: Establish baseline metrics by analyzing historical data.
tasks: Load the Data: Import the October cosmetics dataset into a Pandas DataFrame.
Calculate the Drop-Off: Calculate the exact number of unique user sessions at each stage: Total Views → Total Carts → Total Purchases.
Visualize the Funnel: Build an interactive visual representation using `plotly.express.funnel`.
Business Intelligence: Identify the overall conversion rate and the most critical bottleneck.

blocks.title: The Lookalike Engine & The Out-of-Stock Crisis
blocks.description: Deploy Collaborative Filtering to save a high-value sale.
tasks: Quantify User Intent: Create `interaction_score` column (View=1, Cart=3, Purchase=5). Group by user/item and keep MAX.
Build the Matrix: Pivot data into a User-Item Interaction Matrix.
The Rescue: Run Collaborative Filtering to find a lookalike for a target user whose item is out of stock.
The Deliverable: Suggest Top 3 alternative products to save the sale.

blocks.title: The Q4 VIP Campaign (The Final Challenge)
blocks.description: Scale the engine while managing server constraints.
tasks: Server Limits: Aggressively reduce the 5-month dataset (500,000 users) to prevent cloud container crashes.
The Hero Item: Identify the single most valuable product to feature in the marketing campaign.
hints: Consider filtering out low-interaction users or products to reduce matrix sparsity.
Focus on high-confidence interaction patterns for the 'Hero Item' selection.
